concerns: Amber contrast: #d97706 on #fef3c7 is ~3.5:1 which fails WCAG AA for small text. Plan says 'if any fail, darken' but this WILL fail — treat darkening amber text as a required step, not conditional.
Step 3(a) proposes asserting CSS module class names on the tierMarker element, but CSS Modules hashes class names at build time. Test via DOM structure, text content, or data attributes instead.
Steps 3-4 largely duplicate existing test coverage (lines 31-46 and 69-80 in card-visual.test.tsx). Keep new tests minimal to avoid redundancy.
